source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Hoover Dam across the Colorado River dams up Lake Mead 200 m higher than the river downstream. The electric generators driven by water-powered turbines deliver 1300 MW of power. If the water is 17.5◦C, find the minimum amount of water running through the turbines.
